summary_text: ### 修正対象 - [scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs) - [scripts/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) ### 修正内容（diff形式） 仮定: - `guard: <active|inactive>` は既存の `guardConfig?.enabled === false ? "inactive" : "active"` を採用しました。 - `fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` の smoke でいう provider state 読取は既存の `readJsonSafe(PROVIDER_STATE_FILE, ...)` を成功させることと解釈しました。 ```diff diff --git a/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs b/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs @@ function printUsage(exitCode = 1) { console.log(`Usage: node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --lane provider:agent --task "..." --project /path/to/project node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --matrix /path/to/matrix.json node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --status - node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --health`); + node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --health + node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --smoke`); @@ const parsed = { @@ status: false, health: false, + smoke: false, @@ } else if (arg === "--health") { parsed.health = true; + } else if (arg === "--smoke") { + parsed.smoke = true; @@ function handleHealth() { const state = readJsonSafe(PROVIDER_STATE_FILE, { updatedAt: "", providers: {}, lanes: {} }); console.log(buildHealthSummary(state, guardConfig)); return 0; } + +function handleSmoke() { + readJsonSafe(PROVIDER_STATE_FILE, { updatedAt: "", providers: {}, lanes: {} }); + const guardState = guardConfig?.enabled === false ? "inactive" : "active"; + console.log("FUGUE_SMOKE_OK"); + console.log("bridge: loaded"); + console.log(`guard: ${guardState}`); + return 0; +} async function main() { - const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2)); - - if (args.health) { - process.exit(handleHealth()); - } - if (args.status) { - process.exit(handleStatus()); - } - if (args.matrix) { - process.exit(await handleMatrix(args)); - } - if (args.lane) { - process.exit(await handleSingleLane(args)); + try { + const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2)); + if (args.smoke) { + process.exit(handleSmoke()); + } + if (args.health) { + process.exit(handleHealth()); + } + if (args.status) { + process.exit(handleStatus()); + } + if (args.matrix) { + process.exit(await handleMatrix(args)); + } + if (args.lane) { + process.exit(await handleSingleLane(args)); + } + } catch (error) { + console.error(compactError(error)); + process.exit(1); } printUsage(1); } diff --git a/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs b/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ function usage(exitCode = 1) { console.log(`Usage: node fugue-execute.mjs --task "description" --project /path --tier auto node fugue-execute.mjs --resume <run-id> - node fugue-execute.mjs --status <run-id>`); + node fugue-execute.mjs --status <run-id> + node fugue-execute.mjs --smoke`); @@ -function parseArgs(argv) { - const parsed = { task: "", project: "", tier: "auto", resume: "", status: "" }; +function parseArgs(argv) { + const parsed = { task: "", project: "", tier: "auto", resume: "", status: "", smoke: false }; @@ } else if (arg === "--status" && next) { parsed.status = next; i += 1; + } else if (arg === "--smoke") { + parsed.smoke = true; } else if (arg === "--help" || arg === "-h") { usage(0); } @@ let activeRunId = ""; try { const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2)); + if (args.smoke) { + console.log("FUGUE_EXECUTE_SMOKE_OK"); + console.log("execute: loaded"); + return; + } if (args.status) { const state = readJson(statePath(args.status)); ``` 補足: - [scripts/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) には作業前から未コミット差分がありました。上記 diff は今回の `--smoke` 追加箇所だけを抜粋しています。 ### 検証結果 - `node scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --smoke` を実行し、終了コード `0` を確認。 出力: ```text FUGUE_SMOKE_OK bridge: loaded guard: active ``` - `node scripts/fugue-execute.mjs --smoke` を実行し、終了コード `0` を確認。 出力: ```text FUGUE_EXECUTE_SMOKE_OK execute: loaded ```
